identity.mission: Create a bilingual, luxury beauty salon experience that feels personal, elegant, and high-end, avoiding generic 'spa' templates.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix classic ornate aesthetics with modern clean layouts.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a pampering session.
Content is King: Let the before/after photos and service details shine.
Negative Space: Use generous padding to create a sense of luxury and calm.

grid_strategies.name: The Gallery Wall
grid_strategies.description: Masonry layout for work samples, mixing vertical and horizontal shots.

grid_strategies.name: The Service Menu
grid_strategies.description: Elegant list with dotted leaders or gold separators.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#B5952F] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#128C7E] transition-all duration-300 shadow-md flex items-center gap-2

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 border border-transparent hover:border-[#D4AF37]/20 group

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#E6DFD5] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

textures: noise-overlay: opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50
gold-dust: subtle particle effect in hero section
decorations: Soft blur circles in background (bg-[#F3E5AB]/20 blur-3xl)

media.icons: Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons (Thin weight) for elegance.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold text is dark enough on light backgrounds. Use #B5952F for text if #D4AF37 is too light.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable parallax and smooth scroll for prefers-reduced-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the bilingual toggle and navigation.
4. Use the 'client_business_card' image as a reference for the price list data structure.
5. Implement the 'Gallery' with a 'Before/After' slider component for the nail and micro work.
6. Ensure the 'Contact' section includes a direct WhatsApp link: https://wa.me/34639424658
7. Use 'Playfair Display' for all headings to establish the brand voice.
8. Add a subtle 'gold shimmer' effect to the primary buttons on hover.
